著名記者Nicolò Schira消息，阿舒拉夫今年夏天將從多蒙特回歸皇馬，皇馬主席佩雷斯（Florentino Perez）希望與其續約至2025年。

2018年夏天，皇馬將阿舒拉夫（Achraf Hakimi）租借至多蒙特，租期為兩年。記者‏Nicolò Schira表示，阿舒拉夫將於今年夏天回歸皇馬，皇馬主席佩雷斯希望與其續約至2025年。

阿舒拉夫目前與皇馬的合約將在2021年到期，在多蒙特的兩個賽季中，21歲的阿舒拉夫共出場65次，貢獻10球17次助攻的優異表現。

#ThrowbackThursday 🔙⚽️✨
#OTD back in 2013 (04/09/2013) @marcinho11 and @bvb09 celebrated a very special night in the @championsleague quarter-final at @signalidunapark09! ⠀

The first leg in Malaga ended 0:0 and on this special day 7️⃣ years ago the score at half-time was 1:1. Nobody could predict the drama to come in the closing stages of the match... @malagacf scored the 2:1 in the 82nd minute, but pushed by their fans the #BVB team soaked up the marvelous atmosphere to stage the most iconic endings in #UCL history!

In the first minute of injury time #Reus scored the equalizer, but due to the first leg this wasn’t enough. The tension grew and Dortmund really scored the 3:2 in the 93rd minute.

The chaotic scenes at the end sparked wild celebrations from those in black and yellow, with #Dortmund reaching the next round and maintaining their unbeaten record in the competition.

With 1️⃣ goal and 2️⃣ goal participations the 24-year-old #Reus became #ManoftheMatch! 🙌🤟 ⠀

An unforgettable night... 🤩✨
